Interface AsyncApiSecurityScheme

All Superinterfaces:
Node, SecurityScheme, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
AsyncApi20SecurityScheme, AsyncApi21SecurityScheme, AsyncApi22SecurityScheme, AsyncApi23SecurityScheme, AsyncApi24SecurityScheme, AsyncApi25SecurityScheme, AsyncApi26SecurityScheme, AsyncApi2xSecurityScheme, AsyncApi30SecurityScheme, AsyncApi31SecurityScheme, AsyncApi3xSecurityScheme
All Known Implementing Classes:
AsyncApi20SecuritySchemeImpl, AsyncApi21SecuritySchemeImpl, AsyncApi22SecuritySchemeImpl, AsyncApi23SecuritySchemeImpl, AsyncApi24SecuritySchemeImpl, AsyncApi25SecuritySchemeImpl, AsyncApi26SecuritySchemeImpl, AsyncApi30SecuritySchemeImpl, AsyncApi31SecuritySchemeImpl
public interface AsyncApiSecurityScheme extends SecurityScheme
